date_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
date_0.dialogue: Hey, Ros, let's go somewhere nice. I wanna tell you something.

date_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/neutral.png
res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/neutral.png
date_0.dialogue: We've known each other for a little while now, and we've already been through a lot together. I think it's time I admit that there's something I haven't been telling you.

date_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/sad.png
date_0.dialogue: You've been so nice to me all this time, so it just isn't fair for me to hide something so big from you of all people.

date_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/blushing.png
res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/blushing.png
date_0.dialogue: I think I love you, Ros.

date_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
date_0.dialogue: Not a lot of good happens to me these days, but spending time with you has made me really happy, especially when I think about us being together.

date_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/neutral.png
date_0.dialogue: And I'm so glad you like me too. I mean, I'm pretty observant so maybe you haven't really noticed it yet, but you've been super attached to me the whole time we've known each other. You haven't even let go of me once.

date_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
date_0.dialogue: So I think it would be really nice if we went on a few dates together! We can just retreat to a virtual space like this one and get to know each other.

date_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png

options.option: I'd love to go on dates with you!
I don't really like you, Gigi.

date_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/derp.png
res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
date_0.dialogue: That's okay! I understand that you might need time to recognise your feelings.

date_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/neutral.png
date_0.dialogue: Oh, look, a bit of your meter filled in with pink! That means you're beginning to like me more! The boring lab people always called that indicator 'insanity', but it mostly just lets me help you fight better.

date_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
date_0.dialogue: It might make you need to rely on me a bit more, but I'm sure we'll be inseparable soon enough anyway!

date_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/sad.png
date_0.dialogue: Just be careful you don't fill it up all the way. I know it's tempting, but I don't want to lose you.

date_0.icon: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
date_0.dialogue: Well, now that we're proper partners, we can get back to getting out of here! I have a new tool for you to try! Installing it will also probably help you realise your feelings, but it's up to you.
